actual_title: Data Quality, Missingness, and Computational Judgment

cards.title: Missingness Profile
cards.governance_note: Profile missingness by field, source, group, category, and time period; preserve reason codes and handling policies.

cards.title: Data Quality Evidence
cards.governance_note: Review completeness, validity, freshness, provenance, schema stability, representativeness, validation, and lineage evidence.

cards.title: Computational Judgment Review
cards.governance_note: Audit imputation flags, uncertainty communication, fitness for purpose, exclusions, and governance gates before downstream use.
